title: Kaoru waking up RoE 1
wikitext:
[]: Kaoru waking up RoE 1 Post by Orizon » Mon Jan 07, 2013 5:04 am So I just rewatched RoE 1 in preparation for the third one. At the end of the movie Kaoru seems to wake up in some kind of box (on the moon). The four next to him are open and the other boxes on the other side to him are closed. Do those boxes contain the angels somehow or am I just reading way too much into this? I've looked if there already was a thread like this but didn't find any so... [/img]

[]: Post by pwhodges » Mon Jan 07, 2013 5:10 am Plenty of discussions, like this - search for "coffins".
